arts.ttl: Man Utd seal deal for striker after Bruno Fernandes backing: 'Proud moment'
arts.sum: Ethan Wheatley, who made his senior debut for Manchester United under Erik ten Hag last term, has signed a new contract at Old Trafford, while he is currently out on loan at Walsall in League Two

arts.ttl: Manchester United linked with shock move for West Ham loanee
arts.sum: Manchester United are being linked with a shock move to sign Nayef Aguerd from West Ham, amid an impressive loan spell at Real Sociedad. Aguerd joined the Spanish side on loan last summer after being deemed surplus to requirements at West Ham, following the signings of Jean-Clair Todibo and Max Kilman. The defender joined the […] The post Manchester United linked with shock move for West Ham loanee first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Red Devils launch Jose Mourinho scouting mission
arts.sum: Akcicek has just over three years remaining on his current Fenerbahce contract, but Man Utd are reportedly keeping close tabs on his progress in Turkey as they ponder a possible pursuit during the 2025 summer transfer window. Manchester United have reportedly sent scouts to watch Yusuf Akcicek in action during Fenerbahce ’s Europa League round of 16 first-leg clash against Rangers on Thursday evening.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains why Chido Obi not in Manchester United squad for Europa League
arts.sum: Depleted Red Devils head to Real Sociedad for last-16 first-leg tie having named a squad of just 18 players

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho reveals he has received a special invite from Man United chief and 'great businessman' Sir Jim Ratcliffe and backs 'good kid' Ruben Amorim amid poor start at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho has offered his support to Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim and opened up on his relationship with Sir Jim Ratcliffe.

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho exposes Ruben Amorim and Sir Jim Ratcliffe's character as pressure ramps up
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho has given his take on compatriot Ruben Amorim's struggles at Manchester United, as well as the controversy surrounding Red Devils co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Man United to push for 21-year-old goalkeeper and 22 G/A Bundesliga striker
arts.sum: Manchester United are actively pursuing reinforcements to bolster their squad ahead of the upcoming season – and CaughtOffside has been told that two prominent names on their radar are RB Leipzig’s striker Benjamin Sesko and Burnley’s goalkeeper James Trafford. Sesko, the 21-year-old Slovenian forward, has been attracting significant interest from several Premier League clubs, including […] The post Exclusive: Man United to push for 21-year-old goalkeeper and 22 G/A Bundesliga striker appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: “You can’t say no to Manchester United” – Player says rejecting Red Devils wasn’t an option despite warnings
arts.sum: André Onana insists he couldn’t reject Manchester United despite being aware of the challenges at Old Trafford. The Cameroon international has been speaking to Media Carré on various topics including his move to Manchester United. L’Attaquant have relayed his comments.
